## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 2-3 sentences max. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — maintenance / dependency update
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] ai — AI model or prompt change
- [ ] cost — billing or cost impact
- [ ] infra — infrastructure / CI/CD

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff before opening
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or API keys
- [ ] No mock/seed data added
- [ ] Tests updated or not applicable
- [ ] Related issues referenced below

## Issues closed

<!-- Use "Closes #N" or "Fixes #N" to auto-close on merge -->

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything that needs context, is risky, or needs special attention -->
